data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a deterministic conversion link from accepted quote to booking order.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a deterministic conversion link from an accepted quote to a booking order. However, the evidence provided does not include specific checks or confirmations that demonstrate this conversion link is functioning as required. The prior steps focus on creating offers and bookings but do not provide direct evidence of the conversion process or its determinism, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of checks confirming the deterministic conversion link from accepted quote to booking order.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add conversion link validation checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the deterministic conversion from accepted quote to booking order.
